summary: Added the US-024 reduced-motion fallback test file. The implementation was already complete across the dependency chain: signals.ts detects prefersReducedMotion via matchMedia, mappings.ts maps it to motionAmplitude=0.2 (vs 1.0 normal), evolution.ts passes motionAmplitude through unchanged, and particleField.ts attenuates particle speed by motionAmplitude. All 24 tests pass, build is clean.
